dropdown-select now item-scoped (item-signal-name + field-post/lock/unlock URLs + conditional id/name) and item-field option sources resolved via render/all-field-opts on both the page-render and collection-rerender paths. Verified by unit test + storyboard (q1 built as type=number).
vendored 6 editor files into src/clj/yogthos/stepvine/editor*, rewrote requires, widget vocab (stepvine.components/util), prose mentions, dropped procyon path from deps.edn. Tests + storyboard green.

Ported editor.data + render to domino 0.4.0: reactions computed eagerly by the editor (dependency-ordered), collections projected onto nested paths with synthetic flat ids + live-schema rebuilt per transact, lock relatedness recomputed from the events graph with per-item lock parents. 68 tests + e2e storyboard green; random-uuid warnings gone.
Resolved by the domino 0.4.0 port — domino.util in 0.4.0 excludes random-uuid.

Table core ops functional (sort/page/row-reorder/clear/add/remove) via per-document view-state; comprehensive widget-showcase demo form added; nested collections supported in the engine (recursive expand-item on domino nested model+events) + tested. All on domino 0.4.0.

Ported in commit; array-bound, reactive over signals, persisted + tested.

modal-panel + popover ported; local-signal visibility, tested + demoed.
scroller/border/gap/line + alert-list + info-button ported, tested, demoed.
Calendar onupdate POSTs to the field endpoint (datastar-request header, {<id>_events: json} body); verified end-to-end over HTTP (204 + persists across reload).
Immutable version archive + pin-at-create + load-pinned + opt-in rebase + richer doc record. 105 tests + storyboard green.

Durable audit (diffs, per-doc, never-crash) + per-view submission/approval/snapshot + sole-editor/validity guards + hard read-only finalization. 111 tests + storyboard scenario 9 green. Multi-node rev-rejection + shared lock store deferred to Phase 11.

Unified :kind source resolver + host allowlist; lazy/diff/chainable imports; validation vocabulary→reactions+:valid?; load-time partials. 119 tests + storyboard green. Forms served through splice→compile, all sci-sandboxed.

Document state machine expressed as a mycelium FSM (states=cells, transitions=:edges, guard=:dispatches, :default→reject); validated :workflow graph; pluggable run-step multimethod; in-process directive layer. 127 tests + storyboard scenario 10 (open→review→closed) green. External-client protocol + multi-step compensation deferred until real external steps land.

All §15.13 done: PDF (clj-pdf), index lookups + document-list pages, pluggable document store + embedded SQLite query backend, OAuth2/OIDC login. Completes the §15 reference-guided roadmap (Phases 7-11). 141 tests + storyboard (12 scenarios) green.
Roles model + access store + access-filtered landing + admin UI (users/forms roles) + access-checked creation + role-aware workflow guards. 143 tests + storyboard scenario 13 green.

Shared web/layout navbar (brand+breadcrumbs+user+admin link+sign-out) + footer across landing/editor/index/admin/auth. Breadcrumbs navigate to/from documents. 143 tests + storyboard chrome assertions green.

Per-app CSS: sibling <id>.css loaded into form :css, served live at /app/:id/style.css, layered over platform widget CSS, not version-pinned (live re-skin). 145 tests + storyboard (button re-skinned) green.

FormStore protocol + MapFormStore (default/tests) + SqlFormStore (SQLite: forms working table + form_versions sealed archive, seeded from disk, Postgres-ready). dev/prod on SQLite; 148 tests (both-backend contract) + storyboard green; 8 apps live in data/apps.db.

Admin split-panel app editor: CodeMirror (CM6 + clojure-mode/css from CDN, ported from sporulator-ui) EDN+CSS panes + live static preview iframe; create-new-app scaffold; role association; save live to the DB-backed app store. Plus basic user management. 148 tests + storyboard scenario 14 green.
